issues.summary: [SRPOL-OR] Measure cost changes after economic warehouse type introduction
issues.description:
As an engineer, I want to measure the impact of setting Snowflake warehouse type to “economic” for OR project. Especially I want to compare the results with the ones from previous task: [\[RSW-1108\] \[SRPOL-OR\] Measure PROD gains after optimizations - JIRA](https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-1108)  
Acceptance Criteria:

* Table with measured cost updated, results shared internally

issues.summary: [SRPOL-OR] Add dedicated cost tracking view for OR
issues.description:
As a developer, I want to reliably track Optimal Reach budget spend. Current methodology ([link](https://ads-ams25.slack.com/archives/C0AJW8F9V1N/p1776877262924209?thread_ts=1776872481.912619&cid=C0AJW8F9V1N)) lacks granulation and doesn’t provide enough insight. I want to create new view that would provide more information. This view should be based on information from DATAGOV_DB.DATAGOV_CATALOG.VIEW_QUERY_HISTORY_WEEKLY, udw_prod.udw_platform_intelligence_cs.pi_query_attribution_history and UDW_PROD.UDW_PLATFORM_INTELLIGENCE_CS.PI_QUERY_HISTORY views and be accessible both on EU and US.

**Acceptance criteria:**

* Create a new Optimal Reach cost tracking UDW view providing information such as number of segments ran, spend divided between PROD and DEV, total segment queued and execution time and any other information that will be deemed necessary
* Data is avaliable longer than week - no retencion
* Costs can be matched to processing jobs and payloads
* Actual number of dolars spent
* Data is loaded automatically

issues.summary: [SRPOL-OR] Measure performance gains of new WH and snowpark code
issues.description:
As an engineer, I want know how to best utilize the new snowpark-optimized werehause and snowpark code. To do this, I need to verify where the performance comes from and plan the optimized traffic routing

 

**Acceptance Criteria:**

* Matrix of performance gains prepared (SQL vs spark; XL vs Optim.-L vs L)
* Performance at different time-ranges.
* Recommendation of best traffic prepared.
* After finding best routing and average segment cost saving estimate overall cost savings

issues.summary: [SRPOL-OR-26Q1] Create design documentation (high level design) for recommended approach
issues.description:

**Expected Date (Due Date)**

June 20th, 2026

issues.summary: [AU] E2E Segment Generation Validation — Pipeline Trigger & Size Consistency on PROD
issues.description:
### 1. Summary

Validate that the Optimal Reach segment generation pipeline triggers correctly on PROD for Australia and that segment sizes reported in Audience Builder / Pre-Campaign Insights / Post-Campaign Reporting are consistent with the ML job predictions.

This is a pipeline smoke test, not a full UAT. The goal is to confirm the end-to-end flow works in production before running comprehensive user acceptance testing.

### 2. Context

* AU infrastructure is in place:
* feature flags enabled <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-0">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-833</custom> 
* ACL migration deployed
* <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-1">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-832</custom> 
* Audience Builder ads section enabled <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-2">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-834</custom> 
* Data verification completed <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-3">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-860</custom> 
* AU uses HDMI Streaming Stick-based Ads Dataset + In-App ACR data for AVOD modeling

### 3. Scope

For 3-5 AU advertisers, trigger OR segment generation on PROD and compare the segment size output across:

| Check Point | Source | What to Compare |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ML Job output | ML pipeline | Predicted segment size from ML job |
| Audience Builder (AB) | DSP UI — Audience Builder | Segment size shown in AB after segment lands |
| Pre-Campaign Insights (AI) | DSP UI — OR Insights report | Segment size shown in pre-campaign report |
| Post-Campaign Reporting | DSP UI — Post-Campaign report | Segment size shown in post-campaign report (if applicable) |

**Test configurations** (follow Canada/ESBO pattern):

1. Linear Advertiser/Brand Only
2. Linear + Streaming Advertiser/Brand Only
3. Linear + Streaming mix

### 4. Steps

#### Step 1: Audience Builder, Segment Generation & Validation

1. Trigger OR segment generation via the ML pipeline (Airflow) for selected AU advertisers
2. Confirm t
